== Notes for [[Item:Q3049|Q3049]] ==

Lope de Soufa cafó con Doña Ines de Caftilla y Soufa fu prima-hermana. Historia de la Muy Ilustre Casa de Sousa España, 1770. Capitulo XIX. Descendencia de Juan Alfonso de Sousa por fu hjo Lope. Pág. 320

----

THERE IS NO PROOF WHATSOEVER THAT THIS PERSON IS THE SON OF ANA ESTRADA AND HER HUSBAND. In fact Ana was born in 1498 so couldn't have been his mother

----

THERE IS NO PROOF WHATSOEVER THAT THIS PERSON IS THE SON OF ANA ESTRADA AND HER HUSBAND.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA77EF51EFBBFA9822EF79916CDA40
geni:6000000012546538224


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
